title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
